bosses.name: Ghost King
phases: resurrection narrative: regains flesh -> laments betrayal/loneliness
attacks: not isolated (multi-boss run) -> approximate; base-game Ghost Ship boss patterns
taunts: Your secret soul master is dying, Your Majesty
I feel my flesh again! For the first time in a 1000 years I LIVE!
I am still so very alone
I cannot live with my betrayal...
bosses.note: DOCUMENTED-from-chat (boss-coloured 'Ghost King'). Ghost King = BASE-GAME RotMG (Ghost Ship) -> verify these resurrection lines vs base canon before treating as ROTF-custom (could be canonical or a custom enrich). Coherent narrative arc (soul-master dying -> 'I LIVE!' -> alone -> betrayal).

bosses.name: Time Lord
taunts: Do you know what time it is?
It's time for you to die!
bosses.note: DOCUMENTED-from-chat (boss-coloured 'Time Lord'). A MEME boss (Doctor Who 'Time Lord' / time pun) -> fits the heritage-meme branding. NEW custom meme-boss candidate. ('Kaster: You better be worthy of my time!' nearby MAY be a Time Lord variant or a player named Kaster -> flagged uncertain, not claimed.)

bosses.name: Mewtwo
taunts: Well I can kill you outside!
So you are trying to kill me?
bosses.note: DOCUMENTED-from-chat (boss-coloured 'Mewtwo'). A MEME boss (Pokemon Mewtwo). CORROBORATES the dev-queue 'enrich-mewtwo' task -> these lines can feed it (verify vs the built Mewtwo first). 'Well I can kill you outside!' is a verbatim grammatical quirk (keep as-is).

bosses.name: Lich

bosses.note: DOCUMENTED-from-chat. Lich = BASE-GAME (Undead Lair). These army-summon lines may be canonical or a custom flavour -> verify vs base before treating as custom.

bosses.name: Haunted Spirit
bosses.note: DOCUMENTED-from-chat. A minor haunted enemy ('Hungry...'); likely a Ghost-Ship/undead add, not a major boss.
